title: Pupil absence in schools in England: autumn term 2024
body: "This presents absence statistics relating to the 2024 to 2025 autumn term.  It provides information on the levels of overall, authorised and unauthorised absence in:   state-funded primary schools state-funded secondary schools state-funded special schools   It includes:   reasons for absence absence by pupil characteristic rates of persistent and severe absence absence information for state-funded alternative provision (including PRU)   The release uses pupil-level absence data that we collect in the school census. "
